LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS TANCINCO LAW OFFICES (A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION), LOURDES TANCINCO, JERICHO SARIA, REY TANCINCO, HADRIAN SANTOS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 10, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 3, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Recovery Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16(C)
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CARL DELA CRUZ, TEL. NO. (925) 698-8484 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KAREN K. STROMEYER OF THE MURPHY PEARSON LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 788-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TANCINCO LAW OFFICES (A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION), LOURDES TANCINCO, REY TANCINCO, HADRIAN SANTOS and JERICHO SARIA's Motion For Recovery Of Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16(C) is granted. Defendant prevailed on the motion and achieved a practical benefit. Defendant is entitled to reasonable fees of $18,403.61 and costs of $211.65. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

* * * After hearing, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANTS TANCINCO LAW OFFICES (A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION), LOURDES TANCINCO, JERICHO SARIA, REY TANCINCO AND HADRIAN SANTOS' Motion To Strike Complaint IS granted in part and denied in part. Order signed. * * *

Mtn To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Continued To Jul-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TANCINCO LAW OFFICES (A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION), LOURDES TANCINCO, JERICHO SARIA, REY TANCINCO, HADRIAN SANTOS' Motion To Strike Complaint is continued to July 10, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 3, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
